brief_notes: Drug/disease genetics integration paper. All p-values verified: p=1e-22 drug-phenotype, p=4e-81 disease-drug, p=3e-8 rank sum vs NN, p=1e-28 rank sum shared targets, p=1.7e-43 linear model, 132 DrugBank targets, 28 significant targets at adj p<0.01, 5% held-out. 4 figures. Reasonable discussion and methods.
